steps.title: Identify what the claim requires
steps.content: The underlined claim says the security personnel's selections amplified "a distinct perspective not typically given a formal platform." The correct quote must show that the guard's viewpoint existed but had never before been formally expressed.

steps.title: Evaluate each choice
steps.content:
• Choice A — ‘"The most enjoyable part of curating this show has been seeing the outcome of our efforts: a unique show that spans genres, mediums, cultures, and eras. We hope visitors will sense our genuine affinity for the pieces we are charged with protecting."’: Calls the show unique and notes affinity for the pieces, but says nothing about the guards' perspective being previously unplatformed. ✗
  • Choice B — ‘"My selections for the show were motivated by an interest in bringing publicity to lesser-known artifacts in the museum's collection, many of which tend to be overlooked or even dismissed as uninteresting by most visitors to the museum."’: Focuses on overlooked artworks, not the guards' own perspective being unplatformed. ✗
  • Choice C — ‘"The piece I chose is accompanied by a statement of the personal interpretation I've developed over countless hours overseeing the work and interacting with its visitors--an interpretation that I've previously shared only in small impromptu conversations with those visitors who are interested in discussing their reflections on the piece with me."’: Directly shows the guard formed a distinct personal interpretation that existed only in informal settings — the exhibition is its first formal platform. ✓
  • Choice D — ‘"Throughout the exhibition's development, my colleagues and I partnered closely with other museum staff whose areas of expertise lie in curation and conservation, and whose insights enriched our understandings of the pieces we selected for the exhibition."’: Emphasizes collaboration with professional curators, which undermines the independence of the guards' perspective and says nothing about it being previously unplatformed. ✗
That confirms C is correct.
